name: mine
invariants: output.ok === false || output.quests.every(q => q.objectives.every(o => typeof o.progress === 'number' && o.progress >= 0))
output.ok === false || output.quests.every(q => q.objectives.every(o => typeof o.target === 'number' && o.progress <= o.target))
output.ok === false || output.quests.every(q => q.objectives.every(o => typeof o.complete === 'boolean'))
